name: Brenda Johnson
title: Registered Nurse, Director of Care
bio: With over 15 years of experience in senior and residential care nursing, Brenda leads our care planning and ensures every resident receives the highest standard of personalized support.

name: Precious Okafor
title: Registered Nurse, Care Coordinator
bio: Precious brings deep compassion and clinical expertise to every resident interaction. She specializes in care transitions, medication management, and family communication.

name: Angela Martinez
title: Lead Caregiver
bio: Angela has dedicated her career to providing warm, attentive daily care. Residents and families alike know her for her patient and joyful presence in the home.
